networkfirewall.rulegroup.Capacity.Description: The maximum operating resources that this rule group can use. You can't change a rule group's capacity setting after you create the rule group. When you update a rule group, you are limited to this capacity. When you reference a rule group from a firewall policy, Network Firewall reserves this capacity for the rule group.

networkfirewall.rulegroup.Description.Description: A description of the rule group.

networkfirewall.rulegroup.RuleGroup.Description: An object that defines the rule group rules.

networkfirewall.rulegroup.RuleGroupName.Description: The descriptive name of the rule group. You can't change the name of a rule group after you create it.

networkfirewall.rulegroup.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

networkfirewall.rulegroup.Type.Description: Indicates whether the rule group is stateless or stateful. If the rule group is stateless, it contains stateless rules. If it is stateful, it contains stateful rules.
